title: Thurin Architecte
subtitle: Showcase website & admin interface
description: Custom development of architect Nicolas Thurin’s website, from initial design to production deployment.
frontend: Next.js architecture focused on server-side rendering and performance, styling with styled-components, responsive layout handled with Tailwind, and carefully crafted animations.
backend: NestJS API with JWT authentication and password hashing using Argon2, PostgreSQL / TypeORM database, and a dedicated admin interface for managing projects and their media.
deployment: Application deployed on a manually configured VPS, with attention to security, production stability, and backups.
